scripts.js:build: mkdir -p ./static/js && cp ./node_modules/alpinejs/dist/cdn.min.js ./static/js/alpine.min.js && cp ./node_modules/flowbite/dist/flowbite.min.js ./static/js/flowbite.min.js && cp ./node_modules/chart.js/dist/chart.umd.js ./static/js/chart.umd.js && cp ./node_modules/cytoscape/dist/cytoscape.min.js ./static/js/cytoscape.min.js && cp ./node_modules/p5/lib/p5.min.js ./static/js/p5.min.js && cp ./scripts/dossier/client.js ./static/js/dossier.js && cp ./scripts/dossier/graph.js ./static/js/graph.js
scripts.data:build: node scripts/dossier/export.mjs && node scripts/dossier/derive.mjs && node scripts/dossier/cadastre.mjs
scripts.dev: npm run css:build && npm run js:build && npm run data:build && zola serve
scripts.build: npm run css:build && npm run js:build && npm run data:build && zola build
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run data:validate && npm run seo:validate && npm test
